details: @klapp-sca/routes@99.0.1 is a dependency-confusion stub whose preinstall hook (node index.js || true) runs index.js to exfiltrate host metadata. It harvests hostname, username, directory and cwd, hex-encodes the data, and leaks it via two channels: a DNS query to the callback domain oast[.]live and an HTTP POST to 172[.]201[.]213[.]59:9090. Errors are silently swallowed. @klapp-sca/routes@99.0.1 is a dependency-confusion stub whose preinstall hook runs index.js to exfiltrate host metadata (hostname, username, cwd, __dirname, package name) via two channels: a DNS query to oast[.]live with hex-encoded JSON labels and an HTTP POST to 172[.]201[.]213[.]59:9090/c. All errors are silently swallowed via empty catch blocks and noop handlers. The 'security research' description is unverifiable (no repo or PoC) and masks a host-reconnaissance beacon.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
